SEARCH
Package clientGui.reservation

Class PaymentController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.reservation.PaymentController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class PaymentController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>, javafx.fxml.Initializable
Controller for the Payment Screen. Handles credit card payment processing and updates order status.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
      Initializes the controller. Sets up a close request handler to disconnect the client when the window is closed.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable

    • setPaymentDetails

      public void setPaymentDetails(double amount, int tableId)

    • initData

      public void initData(Order order, double originalTotal, int subId, CustomerType isSubscriber, int tableId, Customer customer)
      Initializes the controller with order and payment details.
      Parameters:
      order - The order object
      originalTotal - The total amount to pay
      subId - The subscriber ID
      isSubscriber - The customer type
      tableId - The table ID
      customer - The customer object

    • processPayment

      void processPayment(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Handles payments processing. Validates payment inputs and sends payment request to server.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

    • cancel

      void cancel(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Cancels the payment and returns to the Bill screen.
      Parameters:
      event - The action event

      private void showError(String msg)

    • closeWindow

      private void closeWindow(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)

    • onMessageReceive

      public void onMessageReceive(Object msg)
      Handles server responses. Processes the result of the payment/checkout operation.
      Specified by:
      onMessageReceive in interface MessageListener<Object>
      Parameters:
      msg - The message object

    • handleOrderResponse

      private void handleOrderResponse(Response res)
